originContent: **CKPE** a shared source powerful platform makes numerous fixes and improvements to the Creation Kit editor from **Bethesda**, includes editor support for games such as **Skyrim Special Edition**, **Fallout 4**, **Starfield**, is a successor to the [SSE CKFixes](https://github.com/Nukem9/skyrimse-test), [SSE CKFixes Update](https://github.com/Perchik71/SkyrimSETest), [FO4 CKFixes](https://github.com/Perchik71/Fallout4Test) projects, also [Unicode patch for SSE CK 1.5.73](https://github.com/Perchik71/usse_test) which started it all for the author of **perchik71**.
translatedContent: **CKPE** এটা শ্বেয়াৰ কৰা উৎস শক্তিশালী প্লেটফর্ম যি **Bethesda**'ৰ Creation Kit সম্পাদকৰ বহু সমাধান আৰু উন্নতি কৰে, সম্পাদকৰ সহায়ত **Skyrim Special Edition**, **Fallout 4**, **Starfield** আদি খেলসমূহৰ বাবে প্রদান কৰে, এইটো [SSE CKFixes](https://github.com/Nukem9/skyrimse-test), [SSE CKFixes Update](https://github.com/Perchik71/SkyrimSETest), [FO4 CKFixes](https://github.com/Perchik71/Fallout4Test) প্ৰকল্পসমূহৰ উত্তৰাধিকারী, লগতে [Unicode patch for SSE CK 1.5.73](https://github.com/Perchik71/usse_test) যি লেখক **perchik71**'ৰ বাবে আৰম্ভ হৈছিল।

originContent: >Check with Steam if your CPU support avx2. Open Steam, in left corner hover over help menu select System Information and search for AVX2.
translatedContent: >Steam-ৰ সহায়ত আপোনাৰ CPU avx2 সমৰ্থন কৰে নে নাই চাওক। Steam খুলক, বাওঁ কাষৰ কোণত help menu-ত hover কৰি System Information বাছক আৰু AVX2 বিচাৰক।

originContent: >If it is supported go with regular release
translatedContent: >যদি সমৰ্থিত হয় তেন্তে regular মুক্তি ব্যৱহাৰ কৰক

originContent: >If it is not, go with noavx2 release
translatedContent: >যদি সমৰ্থিত নহয়, noavx2 মুক্তি ব্যৱহাৰ কৰক

originContent: Download any [supported game](https://github.com/Perchik71/Creation-Kit-Platform-Extended/wiki#brief) and install Creation Kit.
translatedContent: যিকোনো [সমৰ্থিত গেম](https://github.com/Perchik71/Creation-Kit-Platform-Extended/wiki#brief) ডাউনলোড কৰি Creation Kit স্থাপন কৰক।

originContent: Extract all contents into game directory, so that **ckpe_loader.exe** is in the same folder as **CreationKit.exe**.
translatedContent: সকলবোৰ সামগ্ৰী গেমৰ ডাইৰেক্টৰিত extract কৰক, যাতে **ckpe_loader.exe** আৰু **CreationKit.exe** একে folder-ত থাকে।

originContent: Extract all contents into game directory, so that **ckpe_loader.exe** is in the same folder as **CreationKit.exe**.
translatedContent: সকলবোৰ সামগ্ৰী গেমৰ ডাইৰেক্টৰিত extract কৰক, যাতে **ckpe_loader.exe** আৰু **CreationKit.exe** একে folder-ত থাকে।
সকল ফাইল replace কৰিবলৈ সন্মতি দিয়ক।

originContent: Regular users only need this method to access the newest features which haven't been released yet.
translatedContent: Regular ব্যৱহাৰকাৰীসকলে এই পদ্ধতিৰ দ্বাৰা সদ্য মুক্তি হোৱা ফিচাৰসমূহ লাভ কৰিব পাৰে।

originContent: Open a project in **`Visual Studio 2022`** or later. Build the project in **`Release`** mode or **`Release-NoAVX2`**.
translatedContent: **`Visual Studio 2022`** বা তাৰ পিছৰ সংস্কৰণত প্ৰকল্প খুলক। **`Release`** mode বা **`Release-NoAVX2`** mode-ত project build কৰক।

originContent: Then move your build output into game directory, so that **ckpe_loader.exe** is in the same folder as **CreationKit.exe**.
translatedContent: তাহানিৰ build output গেমৰ ডাইৰেক্টৰিত স্থানান্তৰ কৰক, যাতে **ckpe_loader.exe** আৰু **CreationKit.exe** একে folder-ত থাকে।

originContent: If you are asked to replace old files agree to replace all.
translatedContent: পুৰণি ফাইল replace কৰিবলৈ সোধা হলে, সকল replace কৰিবলৈ সন্মতি দিয়ক।

originContent: Download [latest commit build](https://github.com/Perchik71/Creation-Kit-Platform-Extended/actions) of **CKPE** for your game.
translatedContent: আপোনাৰ গেমৰ বাবে **CKPE**'ৰ [latest commit build](https://github.com/Perchik71/Creation-Kit-Platform-Extended/actions) ডাউনলোড কৰক।

originContent: Extract all contents into game directory, so that **ckpe_loader.exe** is in the same folder as **CreationKit.exe**.
translatedContent: সকলবোৰ সামগ্ৰী গেমৰ ডাইৰেক্টৰিত extract কৰক, যাতে **ckpe_loader.exe** আৰু **CreationKit.exe** একে folder-ত থাকে।

originContent: [Nukem9](https://github.com/Nukem9) (for experimental functions, hash and so on, very useful)
[adzm](https://github.com/adzm) (I really appreciate your work, you have [done](https://github.com/adzm/win32-custom-menubar-aero-theme) what I have long wanted to do myself)
translatedContent: [adzm](https://github.com/adzm) (মই আপোনাৰ কামৰ সত্যিই কদৰ কৰোঁ, আপুনি [কৰা](https://github.com/adzm/win32-custom-menubar-aero-theme) হৈছে যি মই বহু দিন ধৰি নিজেই কৰিবলৈ বিচাৰিছিলোঁ)

originContent: [yak3d](https://github.com/yak3d) (For the contribution and development of workflow and support newest Starfield)
translatedContent: [yak3d](https://github.com/yak3d) (অংশীদাৰ আৰু workflow বিকাশ আৰু নতুন Starfield সমৰ্থনৰ বাবে)

translatedContent: ফাইল `Stuffs\FO4\CreationKitPlatformExtended_FO4_Resources.pak` ত মালিকানা আৰু লাইচেন্স নথকা ফাইল আছে; `d3dcompiler\*.*` ফাইলসমূহতো এইটো প্ৰযোজ্য।
